creator: francisco.dominguez.lerma@gmail.com
text:
I would like to add a telegram group of BSD system users that is not listed at https://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html.

The group is about BSD systems and is Spanish-speaking, although we do allow English-speaking users.

Url: https://t.me/sistemasbsd

Contact Email: francisco.dominguez.lerma@gmail.com

Thanks you
